title: Server crashes when executing a window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE departments (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE employees (dep_id INT, name VARCHAR(20), salary DOUBLE, hire_date DATE);
INSERT INTO employees VALUES (1, 'Smith', 81, DATE '2019-08-10'), (2, 'Jones', 55, DATE '2019-08-09'), (3, 'Williams', 55, DATE '2019-07-14');
SELECT dep_id, name, salary, SUM(salary) OVER (ORDER BY hire_date) AS salary_sum FROM employees;
key_bug_features: Executing window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
